title: Helicopter – Red – 021168 – Reamer Vehicle – Ready to Roll – Batteries Included – From 3 Years
features: Plein Gas: This red friction helicopter provides hours of fun for all budding pilots. Works with 3 x 1.5 V batteries (included)
Package:The box contains a helicopter. This model is made of plastic. Dimensions: 21 x 6 x 8.5 cm.
INDOOR AND OUTDOOR PLAYING: This friction helicopter is perfect for alone or with friends.
A GREAT GIFT: Sturdy and timeless, this helicopter is ideal for young lovers or helicopter fans.
On the wheels: adventure and fun is this Friction Helicopter developed by Baby Challenge for little pilots.
